bids.contractor: Constructora del Cabo S.A. de C.V.

line_items.scope: Civil and earthwork (slope retention, stream setback grading)

bids.notes: Strong local BCS portfolio with prior hotel experience in Los Cabos. Price includes all specialty systems. No exclusions noted for stream setback compliance.

bids.contractor: Grupo Constructor Baja S.A. de C.V.
bids.notes: Larger firm with industrial and residential portfolio. Higher price on specialty systems. 2-week longer timeline.

recommendation: Constructora del Cabo S.A. de C.V.
recommendation_rationale: Constructora del Cabo S.A. de C.V. is recommended at USD $3,350,000 — USD $130,000 (3.7%) below the competing bid and USD $650,000 below the client's maximum budget. The contractor has prior hotel construction experience in Los Cabos, includes full specialty systems coverage with no exclusions, and estimates equivalent timeline to the project schedule. Two bids received — sufficient competitive basis for selection.
